creator: dillon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

A large number of bugs relating to NFS and VM maps, and most expecially 
executables run over NFS, have been fixed in later kernels (3.x and 4.x). 
I believe this bug has been fixed recently - the workaround in the PR 
works around a bug that was just fixed today, in fact, but there have been 
other bug fixes as well that may fix this problem.
